title: Test checkpoint/resume functionality
description:
Verify that optimization can be interrupted and resumed from checkpoints.

## Test Procedure

1. Start optimization on test score
2. Let iteration 1 complete
3. During iteration 2, interrupt with Ctrl+C
4. Run: plexus procedure resume <procedure-id>
5. Verify resumption behavior

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] Procedure resumes from where it left off
- [ ] Iteration 1 is not re-executed
- [ ] Baseline evaluation is reused (not re-run)
- [ ] Iteration logs preserved
- [ ] Can complete remaining iterations
- [ ] Final results include all iterations

## Test Variations

Try interrupting at different points:
- After baseline, before iteration 1
- During iteration evaluation
- After HITL approval, before version creation

## Success Criteria

- Resume works in all tested scenarios
- No data loss
- Checkpoint state accurately reflects progress

## Documentation

Comment with:
- Where interruption occurred
- Resume behavior observed
- Any state inconsistencies found
